purpose: Initializes program variables by accepting current date, parameters, and setting default values for expiry days, checkpoint frequencies, and debug flag.
Displays a debug message with the count of summary records read if debug mode is enabled.
Reads the next pending authorization detail segment from the IMS database and updates read count and control flags based on the result.
Checks if an authorization detail is expired based on the difference between current date and authorization date, and updates counts and flags accordingly.
Deletes the current authorization detail segment from the IMS database and increments the deletion counter if successful.
Reads the next pending authorization detail record from the IMS database and updates counters and flags accordingly.
Deletes the current pending authorization summary record from the IMS database and increments the deletion counter if successful.
Takes an IMS checkpoint and displays success or failure based on the checkpoint status, resetting the display frequency counter when needed.
Displays a debug message with the current count of authorization summaries read if debug mode is enabled.
Takes an IMS checkpoint and displays success or failure based on the checkpoint status, resetting the display frequency counter when needed.
Abends the program with return code 16 when called.
Abends the program with return code 16 when an unexpected IMS status code is encountered during detail segment retrieval.
Abends the program with return code 16 if the deletion of an authorization detail segment fails.
Abends the program with return code 16 if the deletion of an authorization summary segment fails.
Abends the program with return code 16 if the checkpoint operation fails in IMS.
